title: Subsystem entity (ONT-E-04)
description: A subsystem within an AircraftSystem, identified by ATA subchapter. Example: ATA-21-50 cabin pressurization is a subsystem of ATA-21 air conditioning. Composes entity.base.schema.json (which composes _meta.schema.json#/$defs/baseFields). Schema version: 0.1.0.

parent_system.description: AircraftSystem URI this subsystem belongs to. Foreign key — Phase 3 validator enforces existence.

ata_subchapter.description: ATA iSpec 2200 subchapter code (chapter-subchapter form). Validated against ontology/vocabularies/ata-chapters.yaml at runtime by Phase 3 validator. Pattern here is structural only; enum membership is loaded dynamically. Example: 'ATA-21-50' (cabin pressurization), 'ATA-32-40' (wheels and brakes).

function.description: Functional description of the subsystem (≥1 sentence, ≥20 chars). Empty / placeholder descriptions fail validation by design.
